steps.title: Join the independent clauses
steps.content: The first clause says Aeneid dates back to the 1st century BCE. The second clause says its heroic narrative still captivates modern readers. A comma plus the coordinating conjunction "yet" can join these contrasting independent clauses.

steps.title: Place the comma correctly
steps.content: Choice B puts the comma after the conjunction instead of before it. Choice C creates a comma splice by omitting a conjunction. Choice D creates a fused sentence with no punctuation or conjunction. The remaining choice correctly uses a comma before "yet." The answer is A.
